mapper.select: SELECT id, direction, message_text AS messageText, is_active AS isActive FROM macro_message WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY direction DESC, id ASC
SELECT id, message_text AS messageText, direction, is_active AS isActive FROM macro_message WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO macro_message (direction, message_text, is_active) VALUES (#{direction}, #{messageText}, TRUE)
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM macro_message WHERE is_active = TRUE
AND direction = #{direction}
